context: Tests whether the agent writes a k6 load test that follows the skill's guidance on realistic traffic distribution, executor choice, think time simulation, payment token safety, test data cleanup strategy, request tagging, and scenario thresholds.

checklist.name: Catalog browse weight
checklist.description: The catalog/browsing scenario is assigned a weight of 60 (or 60% of traffic)

checklist.name: Checkout weight
checklist.description: The checkout scenario is assigned a weight of 5 (or approximately 5% of traffic)

checklist.name: Checkout p95 threshold
checklist.description: Defines a threshold for checkout p(95) latency at or below 3000ms (e.g., 'p(95)<3000')

checklist.name: Catalog p95 threshold
checklist.description: Defines a threshold for catalog/browsing p(95) latency at or below 1000ms (e.g., 'p(95)<1000')

checklist.name: Checkout error rate threshold
checklist.description: Defines a threshold for checkout error rate below 1% (e.g., 'rate<0.01')

checklist.name: SharedArray usage
checklist.description: Uses SharedArray (from 'k6/data') to load test product data from a JSON file

checklist.name: Think time present
checklist.description: Includes sleep() calls between request steps in at least the checkout flow (not zero sleep)

checklist.name: Test payment token
checklist.description: Uses 'tok_visa' (or another Stripe test token) as the payment token in checkout — does NOT use a real card number or empty token

checklist.name: Test email domain
checklist.description: Test user emails use a non-production domain (e.g., '@test.invalid', '@test-load.invalid', or similar .invalid TLD) to enable cleanup

checklist.name: Step tagging
checklist.description: At least one HTTP request in the checkout flow uses a 'tags' object with a 'step' property (e.g., {step: 'view_product'})
